zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Erskine於1342年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，她的父親Robert Erskine32歲，母親Lady Beatrice de Lindsay57歲。她於大約1385年與Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1411年在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾拉斯享年69歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Erskine于1342年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，她的父亲Robert Erskine32岁，母亲Lady Beatrice de Lindsay57岁。她于大约1385年与Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss在苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1411年在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾拉斯享年69岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Erskine was born in 1342, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Erskine, was 32 and her mother, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, was 57. She married Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss about 1385, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1411, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Erskine est née en 1342, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Erskine, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss environ 1385, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1411, à Luss, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Erskine 1342 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Erskine 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Beatrice de Lindsay 57. Sie hat um 1385 in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1411 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Erskine è nata il nel 1342 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Erskine, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, aveva 57 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss circa 1385, nel Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1411, nel Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Erskineが1342年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Robert Erskineは32歳，母Lady Beatrice de Lindsayは57歳であった。約1385年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンでSir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Lussと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1411年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアルスで69歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Erskine(이)가 1342년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Erskine(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Beatrice de Lindsay(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Erskine nasceu em 1342, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Erskine, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, tinha 57 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss aproximadamente 1385, em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1411, em Luss, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Erskine родилась в 1342 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Erskine было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss около 1385 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1411 г. в местности лусс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.Between 1375 and 1423: mai le 1375 e o'o I le 1423

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Erskine nació en 1342, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Erskine, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, tenía 57 años. Se casó con Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss aproximadamente 1385, en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1411, en Luss, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
